title: Jourmung
description: A Small Modpack Focused Around My Standalone Mod "ElemnCraft"
body: A Modpack That Contains My Mod; "ElemnCraft", Along With JEI, JER, Mouse Tweaks, Attribute Fix, And Sophisticated Backpacks. This Modpack Is Small And Extremely Lightweight Whilst Still Having Plenty To Do/Explore, Mainly This Modpack Is For Me & My Friend's Private Minecraft Server.
